name: Affirm BNPL API
what_it_does: Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) and consumer lending platform with REST API — enabling e-commerce merchants to offer installment payment plans (3-36 months) at checkout, with real-time credit decisions, merchant dashboard, and comprehensive API for cart and order integration.
use_cases: Integrating Affirm installment payments into e-commerce checkout via API
Querying loan status and payment schedules for order management integration
Implementing Affirm's virtual card for in-store financing at physical retail
Managing merchant refunds and charge captures for Affirm transactions
Building custom checkout UI on top of Affirm's tokenization API
not_for: B2B payments and invoicing (Affirm is for consumer lending)
Recurring subscription billing (Affirm is for one-time purchase financing)
Non-US merchants (Affirm primarily US; limited Canada expansion)
best_when: A US e-commerce merchant selling big-ticket items ($200-$17,500) wants to offer installment financing to increase conversion and average order value.
avoid_when: You sell primarily low-value items, operate outside North America, or need subscription/recurring payment financing.

auth.notes: Public and private API keys from Affirm merchant dashboard. Basic auth with public key as username, private key as password. Separate sandbox and production credentials. Private key must be kept server-side. Checkout token flow for consumer-facing integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free for development and testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (typically 2-5.99% per transaction); contact sales
pricing.notes: Transaction fee model (MDR). Merchant receives payment upfront; Affirm handles consumer collection. US-based public company (AFRM). Founded 2012 by Max Levchin (PayPal co-founder). 300,000+ merchants. 16M+ consumers. Strong big-ticket retail focus (Peloton, Walmart, Amazon).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for checkouts, loans, transactions, and refunds. Basic auth with public/private key pair. Good documentation. Sandbox for testing. Checkout flow: create checkout → redirect consumer → capture payment. Webhook for loan status changes. SDKs for major languages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Checkout creation idempotent with same order_id. Charge capture idempotent. Refund idempotent with same amount. Loan status reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Private key must never be exposed client-side — checkout token flow required
Consumer must complete Affirm credit decision flow — redirect required
Checkout tokens expire after 3 minutes — create close to checkout
US-only consumer credit decisions — international merchants blocked

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI-DSS and SOC2 certified. US data residency. Public key (client-facing) and private key (server-only) separation. Consumer financial data handled with highest security. Public company with enterprise-grade security program. GLBA compliant for consumer financial data.
